aggregate_risk_shock_cost_inr_crore.rationale: Sums stated stress_test shocks under partial/full realisation: Risk 1 regulatory delay sunk INR 150-300 cr, Risk 2 data integrity INR 50 cr, Risk 3 post-incentive overrun up to INR 300 cr, Risk 5 political crisis INR 10 cr. Low reflects only the smaller items materialising; high reflects concurrent regulatory + incentive overrun realisations.

realised_sme_share.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.5 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a shift. Spread anchored on Risk 4 (high likelihood selection bias toward large unionized firms) and SME burnout risk in Premortem — adverse realisation drives SME share down toward 0.3; small upside cushion from mandated MOUs.

realised_optin_rate.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.75 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a base shift. Asymmetric low side anchored on Expert Criticism stress_test 'low voluntary uptake from high-maturity firms due to lack of compelling operational tool', tied to delayed Killer App; upside capped by voluntary structure.

realised_productivity_retention_fraction.rationale: Base shifted below the 0.95 plan threshold (negative margin at base) anchored on Review Issue 2 'Sustainability of Productivity Gains Post-Incentive Expiry' which mandates a 'Sustained Performance Model' assuming 50% attrition of grant-driven efficiency in the first 12 months post-expiry, with a 75% sustained-productivity floor that triggers formal review.
